title: bouvardia rosea
intro: Bouvardia rosea, also known as the red bouvardia or Hawaiian hibiscus, is a flowering plant species in the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bouvardia rosea include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and soothing digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Bouvardia rosea can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
